calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-25-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John P. Zanghi, Esq. appeared with Joe Madona on behalf of plaintiff John Stewart Company. Limited Scope Attorney Molly Harcos, Esq. appeared for and with defendant Howard Parker.

Settlement Conference Held. Case Settled. Matter has settled according to the Judge Pro Tem. Parties did not report to the clerk before leaving the courthouse. Trial date vacated.

Hon Frank Drago/Judge Pro Tem Andrew Westley, Clerk Garth Sayers, Not reported. (218)
